texto: The world is ruled by such dreams, dreams of impassioned hearts, and improvisations of warm lips, not by cold words linked in chains of iron sequence, --- not by logic. The heart with its passions, not the understanding with its reasoning, sways, in the long run, the actions of mankind.
explicacao: Citação de William Kirby sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The world is ruled by such dreams, dreams of impassioned hearts, and improvisations of warm lips,…” articula motivacao, dreams, passion em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como passion.
